data.name: ApprovalFlow Automator
data.description: Automates multi-level approval workflows with configurable routing rules, escalation policies, delegation chains, and audit trails for procurement, HR, and finance business processes.
data.readme:
## ApprovalFlow Automator

Automates multi-level approval workflows with configurable routing rules, escalation policies, delegation chains, and audit trails for procurement, HR, and finance business processes.

### Framework: Agno

### Tools
["Rule Engine","Email Gateway","Audit Logger"]

### Tags
["approval","workflow","escalation","compliance"]
